thought.text: 我将检查自定义词法源如何读取 Task1 token 流。

action.command: sed -n '1,320p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.cpp; printf '%s\n' '--- generated token header? ---'; ls /workspace/YatCC/build/task/2/antlr 2>/dev/null; sed -n '1,120p' /workspace/YatCC/build/task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.tokens.hpp 2>/dev/null || true

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "sed -n '1,320p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.cpp; printf '%s\\n' '--- generated token header? ---'; ls /workspace/YatCC/build/task/2/antlr 2>/dev/null; sed -n '1,120p' /workspace/YatCC/build/task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.tokens.hpp 2>/dev/null || true", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Inspect custom token-stream lexer implementation"}
